title: Register a new user shows 'verification email sent' notice
description: Verifies a user can submit the registration form and sees a verification email sent notice.

title: Duplicate email registration shows an error message
description: Verifies registering with an existing email displays a duplicate email error message.

title: Required field validation: missing username blocks registration
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission and shows a validation message when username is missing.

title: Required field validation: missing email blocks registration
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission and shows a validation message when email is missing.

title: Invalid email format shows an error message
description: Verifies the registration form shows an error when an invalid email address is entered.

title: Password too short/weak shows an error message
description: Verifies the registration form shows an error when a weak or too-short password is used.

title: Admin can toggle maintenance mode and see confirmation toast
description: Verifies an admin user can access the Admin Panel, toggle maintenance mode, and receives a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify URL contains "/" or another non-login page (login is no longer shown)
Verify text "maintenance" is visible in a confirmation toast or message

title: Non-admin user is blocked from Admin Panel with an access denied message
description: Verifies a non-admin authenticated user cannot use the Admin Panel and sees an insufficient permissions message.

title: Admin can send a global broadcast and see confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can send a global broadcast message from the Admin Panel and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify URL contains "/" or another non-login page (login is no longer shown)
Type "Scheduled maintenance starts in 10 minutes." into the broadcast message field
Verify text "broadcast" is visible in a confirmation toast or message

title: Admin Panel page renders core controls for an admin user
description: Verifies the Admin Panel loads successfully for an admin and displays global controls such as maintenance mode and broadcast UI.

title: Maintenance mode toggle can be switched on and then off with confirmations
description: Verifies an admin can flip maintenance mode in both directions during a single session and receives confirmation each time.

steps.description: Verify text "maintenance" is visible in a confirmation toast or message
Verify text "maintenance" is visible in a confirmation toast or message

title: Broadcast validation: attempting to send an empty broadcast shows an error
description: Verifies the broadcast form prevents sending an empty message and shows a visible validation error.

title: Create a new public co-watching room and land on the room page
description: Verifies a user can create a room as public and sees the room UI (player/chat) after creation.

steps.description: Select "Public" in the room visibility option

title: Create a new private co-watching room using a template
description: Verifies a user can create a private room and the room is created successfully with expected room UI.

steps.description: Select "Private" in the room visibility option

title: Attempt to join a private room without entering an invite code
description: Verifies the UI blocks joining when invite code is missing and shows an access denied/required code message.

title: Attempt to join a private room with an invalid invite code
description: Verifies the UI shows a clear error when an invalid invite code is provided.

steps.description: Type "INVALID-CODE-000" into the invite code field

title: Add a valid video to the queue via direct URL
description: Verifies a user can add a supported video URL and see the queue update with the new item.

steps.description: Type "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ" into the video URL input field

title: Add to queue shows TMDB selection option (modal entry point)
description: Verifies the Add to queue flow exposes an option to pick a title from a TMDB selection modal.

steps.description: Verify element "Select from TMDB" is visible

title: Invalid URL is rejected with a visible validation error
description: Verifies unsupported video URLs cannot be added and an error is shown to the user.

steps.description: Type "not-a-valid-url" into the video URL input field

title: Attempt to add an empty URL shows required-field validation
description: Verifies the Add action is blocked when the URL field is empty and a required/validation message is shown.

title: Send a chat message in the room
description: Verifies a logged-in user can send a chat message and see it appear in the chat history.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "Hello from UI test" into the chat message input field
Verify text "Hello from UI test" is visible

title: Chat message persists in visible chat history after sending
description: Verifies that after sending a message, it remains visible in the chat history list (not only as a transient toast).

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "Message should stay in history" into the chat message input field
Verify text "Message should stay in history" is visible
Scroll to the chat message list area
Verify text "Message should stay in history" is visible

title: Add an emoji reaction to a chat message
description: Verifies a user can react to an existing message and see the reaction displayed on the message.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "React to this message" into the chat message input field
Verify text "React to this message" is visible
Click the reaction (emoji) control on the message "React to this message"
Click an emoji reaction (for example, a thumbs up or heart) in the reaction picker
Verify an emoji reaction indicator is visible on the message "React to this message"

title: Floating reaction appears after reacting to a message
description: Verifies that reacting produces a visible floating reaction animation/overlay for viewers in the room UI.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "Trigger floating reaction" into the chat message input field
Verify text "Trigger floating reaction" is visible
Click the reaction (emoji) control on the message "Trigger floating reaction"
Click an emoji reaction (for example, a heart) in the reaction picker
Verify a floating emoji reaction is visible over the room content

title: Rate limit triggers when sending many messages quickly
description: Verifies that rapid message sending triggers the rate limit UI feedback and prevents unlimited spamming.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "Spam 1" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam 2" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam 3" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam 4" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam 5" into the chat message input field

title: After rate limit, user can send a message again after waiting
description: Verifies the rate limit is temporary and messaging resumes after a cooldown period.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Type "Burst 1" into the chat message input field
Type "Burst 2" into the chat message input field
Type "Burst 3" into the chat message input field
Type "After cooldown" into the chat message input field

title: Sending an empty chat message does not create a new message
description: Verifies the chat input validates empty submissions and does not add a blank message to the chat.

steps.description: Click into the chat message input field
Verify text "cannot be empty" is visible

title: Start a Pomodoro session with configured intervals
description: Verifies a user can configure work/break intervals and start a Pomodoro timer with focus UI visible.

steps.description: Select a work interval option from the work interval dropdown
Select a break interval option from the break interval dropdown

title: Start Pomodoro without changing default intervals
description: Verifies a user can start the Pomodoro timer using default work/break settings.

title: Prevent starting a duplicate session while one is active
description: Verifies the UI prevents starting a second Pomodoro session while an active one is running.

title: Complete a Pomodoro session and see it logged
description: Verifies a completed Pomodoro session appears in the session log/history UI.

title: Study streak increments after completing a session
description: Verifies that completing a Pomodoro session increments the displayed study streak.

title: Change intervals before starting and verify they are reflected in the timer UI
description: Verifies that selecting different work/break intervals is reflected in the visible timer state after starting.

steps.description: Select a work interval option from the work interval dropdown
Verify the selected work interval value is visible

title: Join a room awards XP and updates Stats display
description: Verifies that joining a room increases the user XP and that the updated total is visible on the Stats page.

title: XP progress bar is visible and shows progress on Room page after login
description: Verifies that the user can see an XP progress indicator (progress bar) while in an authenticated room page.

title: Daily quest completion via sending 5 messages credits quest XP (happy path)
description: Verifies that completing the daily quest by sending messages results in a visible quest completion state and XP reward credit.

steps.description: Type "Quest msg 1" into the chat message input field

title: Continue sending messages until daily quest shows completed state
description: Verifies that after repeated message sends, the daily quest is visibly marked complete (without requiring navigation to an unlisted stats route).

steps.description: Type "Quest msg 2" into the chat message input field

title: Attempt to claim daily quest reward before meeting target shows not eligible message
description: Verifies that claiming a daily quest reward without meeting the requirement shows a visible error/not-eligible message.

steps.description: Verify text "complete the quest" is visible

title: Daily quest Claim button is disabled or blocked when incomplete
description: Verifies that the UI prevents claiming an incomplete daily quest via disabled state or a visible blocking message.

title: Quest completion state persists after leaving and re-entering the room (same session)
description: Verifies that once the daily quest is completed, the completed state remains visible after a simple page revisit within the same session.

title: Mini player loads and remains visible on the room page
description: Verifies the mini player appears in the bottom-right area after login and initial page load.

steps.description: Verify element "Mini music player" is visible
Verify element "Search" in the mini player is visible
Verify element "Play" in the mini player is visible

title: Play control is disabled until a track is selected
description: Verifies that playback cannot be started before selecting a track (basic guardrail for the player).

steps.description: Verify element "Mini music player" is visible
Verify element "Play" in the mini player is disabled

title: Search for a track and verify results list appears
description: Verifies the search interaction returns visible results that can be selected.

steps.description: Verify element "Mini music player" is visible
Type "jazz" into the mini player search field
Verify element "Track result item" is visible

title: Empty search input is handled gracefully
description: Verifies searching with an empty query does not break the UI and provides a visible validation or no-results state.

steps.description: Verify element "Mini music player" is visible
Click the mini player search field
Verify text "Enter a search" is visible

title: Open AI chat widget and receive a response to a help question
description: Verifies a user can open the floating AI chat widget, send a help question, and see an assistant response in the chat window.

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Verify text "AI" or "Assistant" is visible in the chat widget header
Type "How do I start a co-watching room and invite friends?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "How do I start a co-watching room and invite friends?" is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Send message using Enter key and receive assistant response
description: Verifies the chat message can be sent via Enter key and an assistant response appears.

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Type "What are XP, streaks, and quests in CinePurr?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "What are XP, streaks, and quests in CinePurr?" is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Rate limit triggers warning when rapidly sending multiple requests
description: Verifies that rapidly sending multiple messages triggers a visible rate limit warning.

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Type "Message 1" into the chat message input field
Type "Message 2" into the chat message input field
Type "Message 3" into the chat message input field
Verify text "rate limit" is visible in the chat widget

title: After rate limit, further requests are blocked
description: Verifies that once rate limited, the user is blocked from sending additional messages (e.g., disabled send or warning persists).

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Type "Spam A" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam B" into the chat message input field
Type "Spam C" into the chat message input field
Verify text "rate limit" is visible in the chat widget
Type "Can you respond now?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "Can you respond now?" is not visible in the chat conversation

title: Chat widget remains usable after closing and reopening during a session
description: Verifies the floating chat widget can be closed and reopened and still accepts messages and displays responses.

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Verify element "chat message input field" is visible
Click the chat widget close button
Verify element "chat message input field" is not visible
Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Verify element "chat message input field" is visible
Type "Help me find the study room features." into the chat message input field
Verify an assistant response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Empty message is not sent
description: Verifies the chat does not send an empty message and shows no new user message bubble when Send is pressed with no text.

steps.description: Click the floating AI chat widget button to open it
Verify text "rate limit" is not visible in the chat widget
Verify element "new outgoing message bubble" is not visible
